---
name: Bug Report
about: Report an issue with a spec, standard, documentation artifact, or future implementation
title: "Bug - "
labels: ["type:bug", "status:ready"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

Describe the bug or inconsistency.

## Location

List the file or artifact where the issue appears.

## Expected Behavior

What should be true instead?

## Severity

- [ ] Blocks progress
- [ ] Causes inconsistency
- [ ] Documentation defect
- [ ] Nice to fix

## Reproduction Or Evidence

Provide the steps, screenshots, or references needed to verify the issue.
